command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 "sudo adduser --system --shell /bin/bash --gecos Git --group --disabled-password --home /home/git git && sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/gitea/{custom,data,log} && sudo chown -R git:git /var/lib/gitea && sudo chmod -R 750 /var/lib/gitea && sudo mkdir -p /etc/gitea && sudo chown root:git /etc/gitea && sudo chmod 770 /etc/gitea && echo done"
